title: ebenus major
intro: Ebenus major, also known as the Tower Mustard or Tower Cabbage, is a biennial plant in the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its tall, branching stems and small, white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as an expectorant. Ebenus major offers several health benefits, including relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant's medicinal properties can be prepared through various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
